title: Ghast Soaring Enchantment
description: Soaring enchantment for the harness that increases speed of the Happy Ghast.
body:
ᓭ𝙹ᔑ∷ ℸ ̣⍑𝙹⚍⊣⍑ ᓭꖌ||
"Soar through air"

A datapack for Happy Ghasts that adds a Harness enchantment "Soaring". 

It has 5 levels
It can be found by enchanting books or trading with villagers.
